_doc: YUMI-LAB Product Catalog — Source of truth for printer.cfg generation

gcode_macros.gcode:
[save_variables]
filename: ~/printer_data/config/variables.cfg

[exclude_object]

[gcode_arcs]
resolution: 0.1

[respond]
default_type: echo
default_prefix: echo:

[display_status]

[pause_resume]

[idle_timeout]
timeout: 99999999

[virtual_sdcard]
path: ~/printer_data/gcodes/

[gcode_macro PRINT_START]
gcode:
    M106 S140 P3
    G92 E0

[gcode_macro PRINT_END]
description: End print safely
gcode:
    SAVE_VARIABLE VARIABLE=was_interrupted VALUE=False
    clear_last_file
    RUN_SHELL_COMMAND CMD=clear_plr
    M400
    G92 E0
    G91
    G1 E-2 F2700
    G1 Z5 F3000
    G90
    {% set x_max = printer.toolhead.axis_maximum.x|float %}
    {% set y_max = printer.toolhead.axis_maximum.y|float %}
    G0 X{x_max} Y{y_max} F6000
    ALL_FAN_OFF
    TURN_OFF_HEATERS
    M84

[gcode_macro ALL_FAN_OFF]
description: Turn off all fans
gcode:
    M107
    SET_FAN_SPEED FAN=Aux_Fan SPEED=0

[gcode_macro M600]
description: Filament change (pause)
gcode:
    PAUSE

[gcode_macro M84]
description: Disable motors with position reset
rename_existing: M84.1
gcode:
    SET_STEPPER_ENABLE STEPPER=stepper_x enable=0
    SET_STEPPER_ENABLE STEPPER=stepper_y enable=0
    SET_STEPPER_ENABLE STEPPER=stepper_z enable=0
    SET_STEPPER_ENABLE STEPPER=extruder enable=0
    SET_KINEMATIC_POSITION

[gcode_macro CAT_FILAMENT]
description: Retract filament to park position
gcode:
    {% set x_max = printer.toolhead.axis_maximum.x|float %}
    G1 X{x_max - 3} F8000
    G92 E0
    G1 E-30 F12000
    G92 E0
    G4 P5000
    G1 E-90 F5000

[gcode_macro MOTION_SENSOR_INIT]
description: Initialize YMS filament sensors
gcode:
    M82
    G92 E0
    G1 E50 F4000
    G92 E0
    M18

[gcode_macro CUT_FILAMENT]
description: Cut filament with speed profile
gcode:
    G1 X8 F42000
    G1 X-8 F300
    G1 X8 F42000

SMARTPAD.name: SmartPad
